items.label: Introduction
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games Engine

ZYNQ.games is a client-side game library engine that loads and manages a structured game dataset from a CDN.

It provides search, filtering, sorting, favorites, history tracking, and device compatibility handling.

No backend and no dependencies are required.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
## Script Tag

Loads ZYNQ globally into window.ZYNQ.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

After loading:
```js
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
## ES Module

Initializes window.ZYNQ via side effect import.

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

After import:
```js
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: init()
items.content:
## init(options?)

Initializes the engine, detects device type, loads the dataset, and applies initial transformations.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "all",
  search: "",
  sort: "name",
  src: "...",
  cdn: "..."
})
```

Options:
- mode: all | supported | favs
- search: initial query
- sort: sorting field
- src: JSON source URL
- cdn: thumbnail base URL

Execution order:
1. Detect device
2. Load dataset
3. Normalize data
4. Sort
5. Apply search and filters

items.label: Game Schema
items.content:
## Game

```ts
Game {
  name: string
  alias: string
  url: string
  thumb: string
  category?: string
  devices: number[]

  isSupported: boolean
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

Notes:
- url points to the playable location
- thumb is resolved using CDN base path
- devices defines supported device types
- isSupported is computed dynamically
- isFavorite is stored in localStorage

items.label: Internal State
items.content:
## Internal State

```ts
config: {
  src: string
  cdn: string
}

all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]

favorites: Set<string>
history: string[]

deviceType: number
```

items.label: Device Types
items.content:
## Device Types

- 1: Touch desktop
- 2: Desktop
- 3: Mobile
- 4: Tablet

Detection is based on user agent, touch capability, pointer precision, and WebGL renderer.

Result is exposed via:
```js
ZYNQ.deviceType
```

items.label: list
items.content:
## list

```ts
ZYNQ.games.list: Game[]
```

Returns the current filtered dataset.

items.label: total
items.content:
## total

```ts
ZYNQ.games.total: number
```

Total number of loaded games.

items.label: filteredCount
items.content:
## filteredCount

```ts
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount: number
```

Number of games after filtering.

items.label: search()
items.content:
## search(query)

Filters games by name or alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

items.label: getByAlias()
items.content:
## getByAlias(alias)

Returns a single game.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: getByCategory()
items.content:
## getByCategory(category)

Filters games by category.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("shooter")
```

items.label: filterSupported()
items.content:
## filterSupported()

Keeps only compatible games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

items.label: filterFavorites()
items.content:
## filterFavorites()

Keeps only favorite games.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

items.label: reset()
items.content:
## reset()

Restores full dataset.

```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

items.label: sortBy()
items.content:
## sortBy(field)

Sorts alphabetically by field.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

items.label: sortByPopularity()
items.content:
## sortByPopularity()

Sorts descending by playCount.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

items.label: shuffle()
items.content:
## shuffle()

Randomizes current dataset order.

```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

items.label: random()
items.content:
## random(limit)

Returns a random subset and replaces filtered data.

```js
ZYNQ.games.random(3)
```

items.label: getRandomOne()
items.content:
## getRandomOne()

Returns a single random game without mutating state.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

items.label: toggleFavorite()
items.content:
## toggleFavorite(alias)

Adds or removes a favorite.

Stored in localStorage under ZYNQ_favs.

```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: isFavorite()
items.content:
## isFavorite(alias)

Checks if a game is favorited.

```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: addToHistory()
items.content:
## addToHistory(alias)

Adds a game to history. Maximum of 50 entries.

Stored in localStorage under ZYNQ_history.

```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("alien-hominid")
```

items.label: getHistory()
items.content:
## getHistory()

Returns history as Game objects.

```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

items.label: clearHistory()
items.content:
## clearHistory()

Clears stored history.

```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```
